text: What if I told you there’s a molecule that powers your cells like a hidden battery? Meet FADH2, a key player in cellular respiration, fueling energy production. It’s not just a bystander; it carries electrons to the electron transport chain. This process releases ATP, our energy currency. But here’s the twist... Without FADH2, our energy production would slow, affecting everything from muscles to brain function. Want to learn more about the molecules that power your body? Hit that follow for more!
